title: ZIP-316 Unified Address assembly and encoding
description: Combine a Sapling payment address and an Orchard payment address into a ZIP-316 Unified Address using the zcash_address crate. Expose get_default_address() -> UnifiedAddress on WalletHandle. Unified Address must include both Sapling and Orchard receivers. Encoding must be bech32m with the correct human-readable part (u for mainnet, utest for testnet). Use a subagent to verify the exact zcash_address UnifiedAddress builder API (from receiver types). Defensive programming: assert the encoded UA round-trips through zcash_address parse back to the same receivers; return Err if either receiver is missing; never return a partial UA with only one receiver.
acceptance_criteria: Test: encode a known UA from ECC test vectors and compare byte-for-byte. Test: round-trip (encode → parse → encode) is stable. Test: attempting to build UA with zero receivers returns Err, not panic.
close_reason: encode_unified_address (Sapling+Orchard → UA string), decode_unified_address, sapling_receiver, orchard_receiver. 5 tests pass including ZIP-316 test-vector oracle and round-trip.
